name: CurseForge
description: The largest platform for game mods and addons. Covers Minecraft, WoW, Sims, and dozens of other titles.

name: Epic Games
description: PC game launcher and store. Famous for weekly free game giveaways and exclusives like Fortnite and major AAA titles.

name: G2G
description: Peer-to-peer marketplace to buy and sell in-game items, accounts, currency, and boosting services across many titles.

name: GOG
description: DRM-free game store by CD Projekt. Buy games you truly own — no launchers, no online requirements. Huge library of classic PC games fully patched for modern systems.

name: IGDB
description: Internet Game Database — the most comprehensive game metadata database. Search any game for details, ratings, screenshots, videos, and release history.

name: itch.io
description: Open marketplace for indie games, game jams, and experimental projects. Play free games or buy and support indie developers.

name: itch.io Dev
description: The indie game developer platform. Sell, distribute, and host your games with flexible pricing, pay-what-you-want, and bundle support. Zero upfront cost.

name: Nexus Mods
description: The largest modding community for PC games. Thousands of mods for Skyrim, Fallout, Cyberpunk 2077, and hundreds more. Free to browse and download.

name: ProtonDB
description: Community-driven database of Linux gaming compatibility via Steam Proton. Check if your Windows games run on Linux/Steam Deck before buying.

name: Roblox
description: Massively multiplayer platform where users create and play user-generated games. Popular with all ages, huge library of experiences.

name: Steam
description: The biggest PC gaming storefront. Thousands of games, reviews, community features, Steam Workshop, and cloud saves.

name: SteamDB
description: Detailed stats and historical data for Steam. Track price history, player counts, achievement percentages, and sale dates.

name: WhatExps
description: Track expiring deals, subscription trials, and limited-time offers so you never miss a cutoff date.
